title: Respawn Token
description: Teleports players back to their death location upon respawn. Customizable!
body:
Players can right-click the Respawn Token after death to be teleported back to their death location.



Respawn Token adds 3 new items!

Respawn Token
Token Part
Binding Glue

Crafting the token is simple! All you need is 2 token parts, and a bottle of Binding Glue.

The binding glue is also craftable with a Honey Bottle, Slime Ball, and a Stick. 

Finding the token parts, is another question - These token parts can be found in most, if not all vanilla Minecraft loot chests, and the Wandering Trader will also trade these with you, for a fair price.

Please report any bugs / if you have any more ideas, or just quality of life features in mind. :)

1.20.1 - Curios is Recommended, but optional.

1.21.1 - Curios will be supported when (if) its updated for Forge 1.21.1.
